overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from under a massive concrete overpass, past industrial construction areas and digital billboards, while vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: underneath highway overpass with concrete support beams

events.description: camera tilts down from looking up at overpass beams to street level view
begins walking forward along the road under the overpass

agents.ego_description: moving from under the concrete overpass structure onto the street level, surveying the urban environment

entered.detail: massive concrete structural beams of the highway overpass overhead
tall street light illuminating the area with white light
tall futuristic buildings with glowing windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a view looking up at massive concrete overpass beams in a dark cyberpunk city. The camera tilts down to street level and begins walking forward under the sheltered area, with street lights illuminating the asphalt road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with large digital advertising billboard

events.description: dark colored sedan drives past on the road from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the multi-lane road, passing by illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving down the road with headlights on

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' advertisement with red and white graphics
metal fence running along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along a multi-lane city street under the overpass, a large digital billboard reading 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' dominates the right side. Vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt road while the camera moves forward past street lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial construction area with loading ramps and Versalife facility

events.description: enters industrial area with metal loading ramps and Versalife signage visible
exits the industrial construction zone back to the main street sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through a construction zone with metal barriers and industrial equipment under the overpass

entered.detail: angled metal ramps with diamond plate texture for loading equipment
industrial building with 'VERSALIFE' signage and corporate logo
stacked metal containers and industrial equipment along the left side

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into an industrial construction area featuring metal loading ramps and the Versalife corporate building. The camera walks through this semi-enclosed space with concrete pillars and industrial containers before exiting back to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk under overpass with pedestrian traffic

events.description: begins following a pedestrian wearing pink pants and a jacket

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian ahead on the sidewalk while maintaining a steady walking pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink pants and dark jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete support pillars for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Back on the main sidewalk, the camera follows a pedestrian wearing distinctive pink pants walking ahead. The overpass pillars line the left side while vehicles pass on the right, and the pedestrian maintains a steady pace ahead of the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with tall glass skyscrapers and moderate traffic

events.description: multiple vehicles including a white car and yellow taxi pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk alongside the road, passing under street lights with tall buildings rising on the left

entered.detail: tall modern glass and steel office towers with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
concrete sidewalk reflecting the neon lights from street lamps and buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a long walk down the urban street with tall glass skyscrapers visible on the left. The pedestrian from before has moved out of frame, and the camera continues past street lights reflecting off the wet pavement while various vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadow of a concrete overpass into the open, neon-lit expanse of a futuristic city street. It begins by tilting down from massive overhead beams to the asphalt below, moving forward under the sheltered structure past a glowing digital billboard reading BODY WITHOUT LIMITS. As the camera progresses, the path shifts into a semi-enclosed industrial construction zone filled with metal loading ramps and concrete pillars near the Versalife corporate building before emerging back onto the main sidewalk. The scene then follows a pedestrian in distinctive pink pants walking ahead, with the overpass pillars lining the left and vehicles passing on the right. Finally, the view opens up to a long stretch of urban road flanked by tall glass skyscrapers, where street lights reflect off the wet pavement as the camera continues its steady forward motion.
